title: Equanimity
description: Equanimity is a sleek and modern resource pack with subtle medieval influences, offering a refined visual experience. It combines minimalist design with a touch of classic charm, perfect for players looking for a polished, timeless aesthetic in Minecraft.
body:
Equanimity Resource Pack

Equanimity is a sleek, modern resource pack that combines minimalist design with subtle medieval touches. Featuring clean lines, smooth textures, and a polished aesthetic, it enhances the default Minecraft look while maintaining a refined medieval charm. Whether you're building modern structures or classic medieval designs, Equanimity offers a sophisticated visual experience.

The pack includes reworked textures for blocks, items, and mobs, providing a cohesive and immersive world. Perfect for builders, explorers, and content creators, Equanimity is optimized for smooth performance on a variety of systems.

Elevate your Minecraft experience with a timeless, high-quality resource pack that complements both creative and survival gameplay.
